rules.title: Receipt must be readable
rules.description: Unreadable receipts require clarification before reimbursement.
rules.onFail: Receipt appears unreadable. Please upload a clearer image.

rules.title: Receipt date should match claimed date
rules.description: Receipt date must match the date entered by employee.
rules.onFail: Receipt date does not match claimed expense date.

rules.title: Alcohol is prohibited
rules.onFail: Alcohol charges are not reimbursable under policy.

rules.title: Meal limit in standard cities
rules.description: Meal expense must be at or below $30 in standard cities.

rules.title: Meal limit in high-cost cities
rules.description: Meal expense must be at or below $75 in high-cost cities.

rules.title: Client dinner limit
rules.description: Client dinner expense must be at or below $150.
rules.onFail: Client dinner exceeds policy limit of $150.

rules.title: Lodging limit in standard cities
rules.description: Lodging expense must be at or below $250 in standard cities.

rules.title: Lodging limit in high-cost cities
rules.description: Lodging expense must be at or below $400 in high-cost cities.

rules.title: Premium ground transport is prohibited
rules.description: Premium rides such as Uber Black are prohibited.

rules.title: Software monthly limit for IC
rules.description: Individual contributors have a $50 software monthly limit.
rules.onFail: Software subscription exceeds IC limit of $50/month.

rules.title: Software monthly limit for manager
rules.description: Managers have a $75 software monthly limit.
rules.onFail: Software subscription exceeds manager guideline of $75/month.

rules.title: Weekend single-item team-building inconsistency
rules.description: Team-building claims on weekends with one line item are suspicious.
rules.onFail: Team-building claim on weekend has limited itemization and needs review.
